LanguageData.VPEH_Bloodfocus.description: By forcibly manipulating the bodyâ€™s stores of hemogen, the caster can enter a state of rapid meditation, regaining psyfocus at the cost of hemogen.
LanguageData.VPEH_Bloodfocus.label: blood focus
LanguageData.VPEH_BloodRite.description: Creates a mote of hemogen that follows the caster, acting as an amplifier for psychic sensitivity based on the casterâ€™s current hemogen level.
LanguageData.VPEH_BloodRite.label: blood rite
LanguageData.VPEH_BloodShard.description: Launch a small amount of excess blood as a lethal projectile by forcibly expelling hemogen that has been solidified into a crystalline structure.
LanguageData.VPEH_BloodShard.label: blood shard
LanguageData.VPEH_BloodSpew.description: Spew forth a fine mist of hemogen towards the targets, coating them in sticky, nauseating blood. Those affected are overcome with intense vomiting.
LanguageData.VPEH_BloodSpew.label: blood spew
LanguageData.VPEH_Bloodstorm.description: Creates a downpour of blood, inflicting non-hemogenic individuals with bloodmist, causing intense vomiting. Sanguophages instead regenerate hemogen, and donâ€™t gain psychic heat when casting any psycasts under the effects of bloodstorm.
LanguageData.VPEH_Bloodstorm.label: bloodstorm
LanguageData.VPEH_CloseWounds.description: Forcibly move excess blood to stop any ongoing bleeding. However, it does not actually heal.
LanguageData.VPEH_CloseWounds.label: close wounds
LanguageData.VPEH_CorpseExplosion.description: Uses the casterâ€™s hemogen to overstimulate the blood of a corpse, causing an explosion which deals no damage, but covers everyone in thick bloodmist. Those affected are overcome with intense vomiting.
LanguageData.VPEH_CorpseExplosion.label: corpse explosion
LanguageData.VPEH_Hemodrain.description: Forcibly extracts the blood of the target at a distance and converts it to hemogen. Practical but inefficient.
LanguageData.VPEH_Hemodrain.label: hemodrain
LanguageData.VPEH_SanguineSpear.description: Launches a pressurized spear of blood over to the target, damaging the target and creating a bloodmist explosion. Damage depends on the caster's hemogen level.
LanguageData.VPEH_SanguineSpear.label: sanguine spear
LanguageData.VPEH_WordofOffering.description: Convinces the target to offer their blood to the caster. Can be used on visitors or even during combat.
LanguageData.VPEH_WordofOffering.label: word of offering
